name: shopify-commit
description: Push Shopify products from JSON with dry-run and live modes

scripts.app:init: npm run sync:metafields && npm run db:build && npm run template:single
scripts.workbook:generate: node scripts/generate-intake-workbook-pack.js --schema data/shopify-metafields.product.json --rules config/store-rules.json --brand-sheet config/always-use-brand.csv --template-sheet config/always-use-templates.csv --out-dir data/intake-workbook
scripts.workbook:generate:starter: node scripts/generate-intake-workbook-pack.js --schema data/shopify-metafields.product.json --rules config/store-rules.json --brand-sheet config/always-use-brand.csv --template-sheet config/always-use-templates.csv --out-dir data/intake-workbook --starter-types-only
scripts.import:csv:images: node scripts/import-products-csv.js --input data/products-import.csv --output data/products.generated.json --report reports/review-report.csv --image-root assets/products
scripts.import:csv:images:schema: node scripts/import-products-csv.js --input data/products-import.csv --output data/products.generated.json --report reports/review-report.csv --image-root assets/products --schema data/shopify-metafields.product.json
